cards.jyutping: hou2 ji4 gaa1 zau6 jiu3 dang2 keoi5 maan6 maan2 zoeng2 daai6 laa3

cards.jyutping: ngo5 zan1 hai6 hou2 soeng2 sik6 si6 do1 bei1 lei6 aa3

allow something be a certain way
(after a suppositional clause) in that case; then

as much as; as many as
(often followed by 著|着[zhe5]) taking advantage of

(pattern: 就[jiu4] ... 也[ye3] ...) even if ... still ...
(pattern: 不[bu4] ... 就[jiu4] ...) if not ... then must be ...
to take a look; to check something out [colloquial]

used between two verbs to indicate the two actions being performed simultaneously
used after a verb to indicate the action is temporary, similar to adding 'for now' or 'yet' after a verb

rise or expand when fermented or soaked (food)
to use; to make use of; to employ

you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2])

used as the and in a mixed fraction e.g. 1- ½

1. to zoom; 2. to enlarge; to banish

also pr. [yao1] for greater clarity when spelling out numbers digit by digit

who; 2. whom 3. someone; (of shipments) classifier for number of shipments

defs: interjection expressing doubt or requiring answer
particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?")
particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?")
particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?")
(at the end of a declarative sentence) particle indicating continuation of a state or action
(sentence-final particle) used in questions to link back to prior discourse or context ("what about...?", "and...?")
(sentence-final particle) indicating that a state or situation still holds
(discourse particle) used to mark a slight pause or emphasis in speech
dense wool fabric (used for coats and jackets)
(of skills) forte; strength (of time or distance) 1. length; (adjective) long
someone a lot; to really want to do something
(of a plant) to sprout; to bud
(fig.) (of an idea or plan etc) to start to develop
final particle expressing consent and denial, liveliness and irritation
(noun of sibling) younger brother; slang for penis
(of an unmarried couple) to be close
to be keen on each other
(added before a verb) should do something as soon as possible
accept what someone else has said
(before an adjective for exclamatory effect) so
(of two people) close; on intimate terms
to be fond of; to have a tendency to; to be prone to
(at the beginning of a sentence) afterwards; since then
(used with 也, 都 etc) even
(used with 也[ye3], 都[dou1] etc) even
